questionHtml:
Nitrogen monoxide reacts with oxygen gas to form nitrogen dioxide.

The following experimental data was obtained.

Deduce the partial order of reaction with respect to nitrogen monoxide and oxygen.

meta.title: Nitrogen monoxide reacts with oxygen gas to form nitrogen dioxide. The following experimental data was obtained. Deduce the partial order of reaction with respect to nitrogen monox
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.2—How fast? The rate of chemical change
Reactivity 2.2.9—Rate equations depend on the mechanism of the reaction and can only be determined experimentally. Deduce the rate equation for a reaction from experimental data.
